sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93454" key="sauri/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαυρ-ίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, a kind of fish, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
